label: Monolith attachment
description: A decorative or structural object attached to the void monolith at a specific level, positioned relative to the monolith center.

def.label: Def
def.description: ThingDef used as the attachment graphic or object.

graphicIndex.label: Graphic index
graphicIndex.description: Selects which graphic variant of the attachment ThingDef to render.

offset.label: Offset
offset.description: Integer grid offset from the monolith center, given as (x, y) in cell coordinates.
